ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reputations" (
  "reputation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reputation entry */,
  "publisher_id" TEXT /* ID of the publisher the reputation belongs to */,
  "trustworthiness" REAL /* Trustworthiness rating of the publisher (0-1) */,
  "content_quality" REAL /* Content quality rating of the publisher (0-1) */,
  "user_feedback" REAL /* User feedback rating of the publisher (0-1) */,
  "score_calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the reputation score (e.g., based on user feedback, content quality) */,
  "score_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reputation score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reputation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extension */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the extension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the extension */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the extension */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the extension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension the permission belongs to */,
  "publisher_id" TEXT /* ID of the publisher the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., block, allow) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_permissions_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "publisher_id" TEXT /* ID of the publisher the feedback is for */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the extension */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the extension was used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of usage (e.g., time spent using the extension) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of usage (e.g., number of times used per day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_usage_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update entry */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the extension was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Download link for the update */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_updates_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
